label: File rule
description: A grammar rule that loads its outputs from one or more text files. Each line of the file becomes a selectable output string.

path.label: Path
path.description: Path to a single text file relative to the Language folder. Each line becomes a selectable output.

pathList.label: Path list
pathList.description: Paths to multiple text files. All lines from all files are pooled as selectable outputs.
